title: Full-Stack Staff Software Engineer
intro: Passionate about crafting robust, scalable applications with expertise in both front-end and back-end development.
aboutText1: With a deep passion for crafting robust, scalable applications, I bring extensive experience across both front-end and back-end development. I've successfully built applications leveraging a broad range of technologies and frameworks, including React, Spring Boot, and Node.js.
aboutText2: My expertise extends to developing mobile solutions using both native and hybrid frameworks for iOS and Android. Additionally, I have a strong background in cloud application development, including designing and implementing cloud-native solutions that scale efficiently and securely.
aboutText3: I'm currently leading the Center Of Excellence's Core Squad at Banque Misr where I work with cross-functional teams to deliver impactful projects, driving both technical and strategic outcomes. I work closely with DevOps and infrastructure teams to optimize deployment pipelines, ensure scalability, and enhance the performance of our core artifacts and services.
name: Name

microsoftDesc: Consultant covering cloud application development workload.
ufeDesc: Helping students during practical sessions to understand the basics of the Java programming language, including object-oriented principles, inheritance, polymorphism, interfaces, exceptions, collections, generics, inner classes, and lambda expressions & streams.
leviozaDesc: IT Service Provider, Web (AngularJS), iOS (Native) and Android (Native) Software Engineer. Specialized in developing web and mobile applications related to events' organizations, social networks, and companies' intranet.
